0a94b72c71cad0c4112ea1110437a47c100695ce.text_raw: It would mean a great deal to us if you succeed.
0a94b72c71cad0c4112ea1110437a47c100695ce.text_normalized: It would mean a great deal to us if you succeed.

fa20aa6ce97579006135d34ee98b0f30fe307b84.speaker: ECHO
fa20aa6ce97579006135d34ee98b0f30fe307b84.text_raw: Captain, it seems like we should stay out of their way, instead of going towards them.
fa20aa6ce97579006135d34ee98b0f30fe307b84.text_normalized: Captain, it seems like we should stay out of their way, instead of going towards them.

7d8aff0e8b58601e68d6390969e1113f90fbebbb.speaker: Midas
7d8aff0e8b58601e68d6390969e1113f90fbebbb.text_raw: The jumpgate has already been unlocked by my forces.
7d8aff0e8b58601e68d6390969e1113f90fbebbb.text_normalized: The jumpgate has already been unlocked by my forces.

12720aaa6ffcf4db48ac0e7e04cc0c1f623e940c.speaker: Midas
12720aaa6ffcf4db48ac0e7e04cc0c1f623e940c.text_raw: I strongly advise you not to attack their station directly.
12720aaa6ffcf4db48ac0e7e04cc0c1f623e940c.text_normalized: I strongly advise you not to attack their station directly.

8c926dcfd9e0a1b96ba376659598c5e31ac8882f.speaker: Midas
8c926dcfd9e0a1b96ba376659598c5e31ac8882f.text_raw: Weaken the enemy forces around the system first. It'll reduce their reinforcements when you strike the station.
8c926dcfd9e0a1b96ba376659598c5e31ac8882f.text_normalized: Weaken the enemy forces around the system first. It'll reduce their reinforcements when you strike the station.

ed9badfcb6afc4480439069d08bb8c93d7965d36.speaker: ECHO
ed9badfcb6afc4480439069d08bb8c93d7965d36.text_raw: Captain, we are receiving a message.
ed9badfcb6afc4480439069d08bb8c93d7965d36.text_normalized: Captain, we are receiving a message.

73a3fc95988b0268e2b6d205e4eca2392f99413a.speaker: Midas
73a3fc95988b0268e2b6d205e4eca2392f99413a.text_raw: Well done milky, we destroyed their advances in this sector.
73a3fc95988b0268e2b6d205e4eca2392f99413a.text_normalized: Well done milky, we destroyed their advances in this sector.

8da5d399b528310f4116736477d7bbc83ce08c62.speaker: Midas
8da5d399b528310f4116736477d7bbc83ce08c62.text_raw: It will have slowed them down, but nothing more.
8da5d399b528310f4116736477d7bbc83ce08c62.text_normalized: It will have slowed them down, but nothing more.

6a757e566e5cc00df68f43637b537c77271e5d2e.speaker: Midas
6a757e566e5cc00df68f43637b537c77271e5d2e.text_raw: They are an inevitable plague upon our sectors.
6a757e566e5cc00df68f43637b537c77271e5d2e.text_normalized: They are an inevitable plague upon our sectors.

e207c854b65e33d6c38513ab357c94c6b5385733.speaker: Midas
e207c854b65e33d6c38513ab357c94c6b5385733.text_raw: Let's meet up at the following coordinates for our next course of action.
e207c854b65e33d6c38513ab357c94c6b5385733.text_normalized: Let's meet up at the following coordinates for our next course of action.

7142d2b927fd9cf0d7b90e57af9bf92f8375f00f.speaker: Midas
7142d2b927fd9cf0d7b90e57af9bf92f8375f00f.text_raw: Meridia's Chosen, may the meteors of Uron rain upon them, are not our only problem.
7142d2b927fd9cf0d7b90e57af9bf92f8375f00f.text_normalized: Meridia's Chosen, may the meteors of Uron rain upon them, are not our only problem.

44e129475336dffc441bd839aa981551f2ac3d6b.speaker: Midas
44e129475336dffc441bd839aa981551f2ac3d6b.text_raw: Your factions are knocking at our sectors. They are building their own gate, since we destroyed the old ones.
44e129475336dffc441bd839aa981551f2ac3d6b.text_normalized: Your factions are knocking at our sectors. They are building their own gate, since we destroyed the old ones.

847130101eb6b88f12147150f99306618e002c8a.speaker: captain
847130101eb6b88f12147150f99306618e002c8a.text_raw: So wouldn't it be time to retreat to your Darkspace, bolster defenses?
847130101eb6b88f12147150f99306618e002c8a.text_normalized: So wouldn't it be time to retreat to your Darkspace, bolster defenses?

eda52e09466c11dbb172162d97ac05ffcb3079a7.speaker: Midas
eda52e09466c11dbb172162d97ac05ffcb3079a7.text_raw: You do not understand. Our armadas are massive, enough to wipe out every warship in this quadrant.
eda52e09466c11dbb172162d97ac05ffcb3079a7.text_normalized: You do not understand. Our armadas are massive, enough to wipe out every warship in this quadrant.

44709911d89860d9160e75fc7344b61a09937175.speaker: Midas
44709911d89860d9160e75fc7344b61a09937175.text_raw: Sadly, they've been distracted, fighting on another front.
44709911d89860d9160e75fc7344b61a09937175.text_normalized: Sadly, they've been distracted, fighting on another front.

992a46ba475248f2a12f2ff48dc879d965098343.speaker: Midas
992a46ba475248f2a12f2ff48dc879d965098343.text_raw: So... we need to sabotage this construction as much as we can.
992a46ba475248f2a12f2ff48dc879d965098343.text_normalized: So, we need to sabotage this construction as much as we can.

a7889d13985fa5ae6b0b3935c55617c848f4fac7.speaker: Midas
a7889d13985fa5ae6b0b3935c55617c848f4fac7.text_raw: They require massive amounts of construction materials for their construction.
a7889d13985fa5ae6b0b3935c55617c848f4fac7.text_normalized: They require massive amounts of construction materials for their construction.

ca91fc3240672a7b4a331e692a5d717b93ae08c8.speaker: ECHO
ca91fc3240672a7b4a331e692a5d717b93ae08c8.text_raw: Captain, maybe don't mention you helped with hauling construction materials.
ca91fc3240672a7b4a331e692a5d717b93ae08c8.text_normalized: Captain, maybe don't mention you helped with hauling construction materials.

9fed197fb221730ce50175830958502c3c530d6a.speaker: Midas
9fed197fb221730ce50175830958502c3c530d6a.text_raw: ... Right. We've found a location for one of their cargo depots, it appears to be the least guarded.
9fed197fb221730ce50175830958502c3c530d6a.text_normalized: . Right. We've found a location for one of their cargo depots, it appears to be the least guarded.

98d5d1ba912be675e7180a95f3a76c51bc06e64c.speaker: Midas
98d5d1ba912be675e7180a95f3a76c51bc06e64c.text_raw: Escort one of our ships to the depot. We'll give them a little electromagnetic surprise.
98d5d1ba912be675e7180a95f3a76c51bc06e64c.text_normalized: Escort one of our ships to the depot. We'll give them a little electromagnetic surprise.

3a893a5fc892a7ea6467bd4f2b94cb68c2985bfb.speaker: Midas
3a893a5fc892a7ea6467bd4f2b94cb68c2985bfb.text_raw: We'll wait until you are clear of the zone, you've earned that.
3a893a5fc892a7ea6467bd4f2b94cb68c2985bfb.text_normalized: We'll wait until you are clear of the zone, you've earned that.

d8befeb71d7661c7ba76acb257599f28f4450bdb.speaker: ECHO
d8befeb71d7661c7ba76acb257599f28f4450bdb.text_raw: Now, get out of here! Back to
d8befeb71d7661c7ba76acb257599f28f4450bdb.text_normalized: Now, get out of here! Back to

2e4c1e0f61c46eb85ce30d967be192185c0c11d6.speaker: Midas
2e4c1e0f61c46eb85ce30d967be192185c0c11d6.text_raw: The bomb shut down their construction, temporarily.
2e4c1e0f61c46eb85ce30d967be192185c0c11d6.text_normalized: The bomb shut down their construction, temporarily.

daae630ef686e137cb0b841d7fad8b1f7b9f1da3.speaker: ECHO
daae630ef686e137cb0b841d7fad8b1f7b9f1da3.text_raw: There seem to be a lot of temporarily solutions lately.
daae630ef686e137cb0b841d7fad8b1f7b9f1da3.text_normalized: There seem to be a lot of temporarily solutions lately.

b05a92b4ba5cb1758c2edaa688468a3b73e2b838.speaker: Midas
b05a92b4ba5cb1758c2edaa688468a3b73e2b838.text_raw: Our focus on the invading factions also did us harm.
b05a92b4ba5cb1758c2edaa688468a3b73e2b838.text_normalized: Our focus on the invading factions also did us harm.

cf22d02eaca3eca3a1d873ecdcd3c5cb1c39e72f.speaker: Midas
cf22d02eaca3eca3a1d873ecdcd3c5cb1c39e72f.text_raw: Meridia's Filth has taken over our wormhole entry point into this quadrant.
cf22d02eaca3eca3a1d873ecdcd3c5cb1c39e72f.text_normalized: Meridia's Filth has taken over our wormhole entry point into this quadrant.

f88216bea085bbbc41894448b2521b96c60bf52f.speaker: Midas
f88216bea085bbbc41894448b2521b96c60bf52f.text_raw: I've gathered the remaining forces to repel them, and I would like your strength added to them.
f88216bea085bbbc41894448b2521b96c60bf52f.text_normalized: I've gathered the remaining forces to repel them, and I would like your strength added to them.

bc52decd888c3507ddcd0024ce96d116be36ecc1.speaker: Midas
bc52decd888c3507ddcd0024ce96d116be36ecc1.text_raw: Once you enter the location, we'll warp in.
bc52decd888c3507ddcd0024ce96d116be36ecc1.text_normalized: Once you enter the location, we'll warp in.

4eb06477dbd065cfd12dd787ebb74ceaee568db6.speaker: Midas
4eb06477dbd065cfd12dd787ebb74ceaee568db6.text_raw: But more will take their place soon.
4eb06477dbd065cfd12dd787ebb74ceaee568db6.text_normalized: But more will take their place soon.

7eeebe097a84b07f97901e26e8719c5d8fa1392d.speaker: Midas
7eeebe097a84b07f97901e26e8719c5d8fa1392d.text_raw: I don't know how, but the filth collapsed the wormhole. It will take us time before we can reestablish a new connection with our home.
7eeebe097a84b07f97901e26e8719c5d8fa1392d.text_normalized: I don't know how, but the filth collapsed the wormhole. It will take us time before we can reestablish a new connection with our home.

38bcceafa172a00d667de1d74948ddd841fed292.speaker: Midas
38bcceafa172a00d667de1d74948ddd841fed292.text_raw: I will contact you when that time arises.
38bcceafa172a00d667de1d74948ddd841fed292.text_normalized: I will contact you when that time arises.

cfbe69029b0929665f3527e9303d1191b52d370f.speaker: Midas
cfbe69029b0929665f3527e9303d1191b52d370f.text_raw: I feel like a reward is in place.
cfbe69029b0929665f3527e9303d1191b52d370f.text_normalized: I feel like a reward is in place.

97333b5cde5c247bd5a4d5172192c7a66a5581f7.speaker: Umbral
97333b5cde5c247bd5a4d5172192c7a66a5581f7.text_raw: We set up this small outpost, to act as a base of operations.
97333b5cde5c247bd5a4d5172192c7a66a5581f7.text_normalized: We set up this small outpost, to act as a base of operations.

1ad799d1dc3df4746563cb53d2ab7d4266f490b0.speaker: Umbral
1ad799d1dc3df4746563cb53d2ab7d4266f490b0.text_raw: ... Everything is going fine, we have expanded our Metafiber experiments.
1ad799d1dc3df4746563cb53d2ab7d4266f490b0.text_normalized: . Everything is going fine, we have expanded our Metafiber experiments.

44709cf09dba9f45ec7fcd6db3c304d851a23f4c.speaker: Umbral
44709cf09dba9f45ec7fcd6db3c304d851a23f4c.text_raw: New opportunities have arrived with the new war.
44709cf09dba9f45ec7fcd6db3c304d851a23f4c.text_normalized: New opportunities have arrived with the new war.

a04f21c93560f6710482aa121460b2b85f6c3447.speaker: Umbral
a04f21c93560f6710482aa121460b2b85f6c3447.text_raw: This is where we need you.
a04f21c93560f6710482aa121460b2b85f6c3447.text_normalized: This is where we need you.

a60f7d75c9d2e697a1cb43371d3441937ad33b22.speaker: Umbral
a60f7d75c9d2e697a1cb43371d3441937ad33b22.text_raw: The stations within the Conquest Sector were assembled rather crudely. Little attention was given to security.
a60f7d75c9d2e697a1cb43371d3441937ad33b22.text_normalized: The stations within the Conquest Sector were assembled rather crudely. Little attention was given to security.

b5e421e84591fc882823a62655d7dfbe9e2bff99.speaker: Umbral
b5e421e84591fc882823a62655d7dfbe9e2bff99.text_raw: Their software are not getting any security updates.
b5e421e84591fc882823a62655d7dfbe9e2bff99.text_normalized: Their software are not getting any security updates.

018f5cf1116a64f5a4bec48755034cfdcc3436d5.speaker: Umbral
018f5cf1116a64f5a4bec48755034cfdcc3436d5.text_raw: That is where we found our in.
018f5cf1116a64f5a4bec48755034cfdcc3436d5.text_normalized: That is where we found our in.

c5140b1f23fca558638f95aecd60d0cd0b20db0b.speaker: Umbral
c5140b1f23fca558638f95aecd60d0cd0b20db0b.text_raw: I will provide you with a specialized infiltration tool. A hacking tool if you will.
c5140b1f23fca558638f95aecd60d0cd0b20db0b.text_normalized: I will provide you with a specialized infiltration tool. A hacking tool if you will.

0e674643b619cd038334b84313f137feb1feabf4.speaker: Umbral
0e674643b619cd038334b84313f137feb1feabf4.text_raw: Use this on any friendly station within the Conquest Sector.
0e674643b619cd038334b84313f137feb1feabf4.text_normalized: Use this on any friendly station within the Conquest Sector.

1913ad41e013435a15f5d06b0752e2513d7313e7.speaker: Umbral
1913ad41e013435a15f5d06b0752e2513d7313e7.text_raw: It will infect their systems... and persist, even if they attempt repairs or complete reconstruction.
1913ad41e013435a15f5d06b0752e2513d7313e7.text_normalized: It will infect their systems, and persist, even if they attempt repairs or complete reconstruction.

9c7550a10fc82fc5e374d6bc15b0f2bb5a206941.speaker: Umbral
9c7550a10fc82fc5e374d6bc15b0f2bb5a206941.text_raw: How? Probably the cloud, I don't know... Not that important.
9c7550a10fc82fc5e374d6bc15b0f2bb5a206941.text_normalized: How? Probably the cloud, I don't know. Not that important.

ae325f039094fbb8c4d10d5a72edb2b39168e641.speaker: Umbral
ae325f039094fbb8c4d10d5a72edb2b39168e641.text_raw: It's all safe for you. You will not suffer any reputation loss with the station you choose, should really only be benefitial.
ae325f039094fbb8c4d10d5a72edb2b39168e641.text_normalized: It's all safe for you. You will not suffer any reputation loss with the station you choose, should really only be benefitial.

017a69500eba14165724c030b8ce665ca3783f92.speaker: Umbral
017a69500eba14165724c030b8ce665ca3783f92.text_raw: Once successful, I will make contact.
017a69500eba14165724c030b8ce665ca3783f92.text_normalized: Once successful, I will make contact.

59fe5736f3b30c0bd3868eb5054ec0c1609bbfa7.speaker: Umbral
59fe5736f3b30c0bd3868eb5054ec0c1609bbfa7.text_raw: Alright, we have set up the Umbral Reach board, there you will be able to find a mission which will infect their systems further.
59fe5736f3b30c0bd3868eb5054ec0c1609bbfa7.text_normalized: Alright, we have set up the Umbral Reach board, there you will be able to find a mission which will infect their systems further.

e1c3aa4854d8cb1120cbaaf27f8264b0e44a4291.speaker: Umbral
e1c3aa4854d8cb1120cbaaf27f8264b0e44a4291.text_raw: Once we reach full infection in the station, we will seek contact again.
e1c3aa4854d8cb1120cbaaf27f8264b0e44a4291.text_normalized: Once we reach full infection in the station, we will seek contact again.

65062d92e31acfc585cfc8414ebd815dfa097273.speaker: ECHO
65062d92e31acfc585cfc8414ebd815dfa097273.text_raw: Oh! A new button Captain, let's press it.
65062d92e31acfc585cfc8414ebd815dfa097273.text_normalized: Oh! A new button Captain, let's press it.

074ec3547dec7fa72b1435e9065a9e0cd1f734c0.speaker: Umbral
074ec3547dec7fa72b1435e9065a9e0cd1f734c0.text_raw: That was a lot quicker then anticipated..
074ec3547dec7fa72b1435e9065a9e0cd1f734c0.text_normalized: That was a lot quicker then anticipated.

36926e616c406153643d42fb76eb25568d196e8b.speaker: Umbral
36926e616c406153643d42fb76eb25568d196e8b.text_raw: Head back to the outpost, as I heard Stella has arrived there from the Frontier.
36926e616c406153643d42fb76eb25568d196e8b.text_normalized: Head back to the outpost, as I heard Stella has arrived there from the Frontier.

3b21b327b65ea322e1188ce4ee908954b653abea.speaker: Umbral
3b21b327b65ea322e1188ce4ee908954b653abea.text_raw: She will be your liason going forward.
3b21b327b65ea322e1188ce4ee908954b653abea.text_normalized: She will be your liason going forward.

0836a1453fa10e7eb40b623999988475b060602e.speaker: Umbral
0836a1453fa10e7eb40b623999988475b060602e.text_raw: And she will make a fine agent out of you yet.
0836a1453fa10e7eb40b623999988475b060602e.text_normalized: And she will make a fine agent out of you yet.

8dbd4b4d6042be63f988d942140e9101bdcd6a8e.speaker: Stella Chion
8dbd4b4d6042be63f988d942140e9101bdcd6a8e.text_raw: No... Ok? Sure... I'm fine thank you.
8dbd4b4d6042be63f988d942140e9101bdcd6a8e.text_normalized: No. Ok? Sure, I'm fine thank you.

c6d34eaaeb2be66dbbe9d44ee55743245caba160.speaker: Stella Chion
c6d34eaaeb2be66dbbe9d44ee55743245caba160.text_raw: I have to fit my new role, you understand.
c6d34eaaeb2be66dbbe9d44ee55743245caba160.text_normalized: I have to fit my new role, you understand.

823fd1cfd1631c46afa6a72db8d7963cfca1f172.speaker: Stella Chion
823fd1cfd1631c46afa6a72db8d7963cfca1f172.text_raw: I have been tasked overseeing your efforts in this new sector.
823fd1cfd1631c46afa6a72db8d7963cfca1f172.text_normalized: I have been tasked overseeing your efforts in this new sector.

a3ba4464711373f71c693d1928c920b8fe61b941.speaker: Stella Chion
a3ba4464711373f71c693d1928c920b8fe61b941.text_raw: We don't need to take over by force, if we can just control the opposition.
a3ba4464711373f71c693d1928c920b8fe61b941.text_normalized: We don't need to take over by force, if we can just control the opposition.

ee5fba946923b1c2f7b6746665cb99744452c32b.speaker: Stella Chion
ee5fba946923b1c2f7b6746665cb99744452c32b.text_raw: But sometimes... force is required, the destruction of the enemy! Eliminate them! Vaporize them! Shred them down to their beams!
ee5fba946923b1c2f7b6746665cb99744452c32b.text_normalized: But sometimes, force is required, the destruction of the enemy! Eliminate them! Vaporize them! Shred them down to their beams!

e215d9d06f3f5fddef89fbc372f6c500101548d0.speaker: ECHO
e215d9d06f3f5fddef89fbc372f6c500101548d0.text_raw: Other then that, are you alright?
e215d9d06f3f5fddef89fbc372f6c500101548d0.text_normalized: Other then that, are you alright?

4ce605185e4b246ec50b8e8c00d7b2052bc0bc63.speaker: Stella Chion
4ce605185e4b246ec50b8e8c00d7b2052bc0bc63.text_raw: ... yes... We discovered some wannabe spies closeby, surely trying to gather intel on our new presence here.
4ce605185e4b246ec50b8e8c00d7b2052bc0bc63.text_normalized: , yes. We discovered some wannabe spies closeby, surely trying to gather intel on our new presence here.

0e6aafa0ba2a4a81fabb3e134c9d411248793a34.speaker: Stella Chion
0e6aafa0ba2a4a81fabb3e134c9d411248793a34.text_raw: Right, I forgot... make sure you bring one of those Decoy Transponders with you from the shop, if you value your reputation with whoever you will encounter.
0e6aafa0ba2a4a81fabb3e134c9d411248793a34.text_normalized: Right, I forgot, make sure you bring one of those Decoy Transponders with you from the shop, if you value your reputation with whoever you will encounter.

0698a8eb1ffd774bdee9a46515e9c9e767e065c8.speaker: ECHO
0698a8eb1ffd774bdee9a46515e9c9e767e065c8.text_raw: Interesting. Captain, the spoofed transponder signature will persist only until your next station docking.
0698a8eb1ffd774bdee9a46515e9c9e767e065c8.text_normalized: Interesting. Captain, the spoofed transponder signature will persist only until your next station docking.

d22d2ed9ba9bf8f6976f9e8d1815e71e570e7af5.speaker: captain
d22d2ed9ba9bf8f6976f9e8d1815e71e570e7af5.text_raw: We eliminated them, Stella. They were mercenaries of the Omnitac Agency.
d22d2ed9ba9bf8f6976f9e8d1815e71e570e7af5.text_normalized: We eliminated them, Stella. They were mercenaries of the Omnitac Agency.

6f09767e49aae5bd4f3dcf1c151672bd914cb423.speaker: Stella Chion
6f09767e49aae5bd4f3dcf1c151672bd914cb423.text_raw: It was the Omnitac Agency all along!
6f09767e49aae5bd4f3dcf1c151672bd914cb423.text_normalized: It was the Omnitac Agency all along!

7a01949e0219d836ffcb7fc8f35ae979fd1ed15b.speaker: ECHO
7a01949e0219d836ffcb7fc8f35ae979fd1ed15b.text_raw: An esteemed escort service would probably not operate without someone hiring them.
7a01949e0219d836ffcb7fc8f35ae979fd1ed15b.text_normalized: An esteemed escort service would probably not operate without someone hiring them.

9cba63157a19dd1cfd82d672ce45b9e44ddfb34b.speaker: Stella Chion
9cba63157a19dd1cfd82d672ce45b9e44ddfb34b.text_raw: This does not help us any further, we are dealing with someone trying to cover their warp signature.
9cba63157a19dd1cfd82d672ce45b9e44ddfb34b.text_normalized: This does not help us any further, we are dealing with someone trying to cover their warp signature.

c362b9ce9de167738c4cdd287cc47e354962ffd1.speaker: Stella Chion
c362b9ce9de167738c4cdd287cc47e354962ffd1.text_raw: We'll have to let our agents infiltrate further and gather information.
c362b9ce9de167738c4cdd287cc47e354962ffd1.text_normalized: We'll have to let our agents infiltrate further and gather information.

73ea85189a6bea5ad568b0561754627d8da1d381.speaker: Stella Chion
73ea85189a6bea5ad568b0561754627d8da1d381.text_raw: In the meantime, your task is to infect more stations.
73ea85189a6bea5ad568b0561754627d8da1d381.text_normalized: In the meantime, your task is to infect more stations.

85f91fcecd68348942fa3ec53b1cec419a482876.speaker: Stella Chion
85f91fcecd68348942fa3ec53b1cec419a482876.text_raw: Check out the shop if you need more hacking tools.
85f91fcecd68348942fa3ec53b1cec419a482876.text_normalized: Check out the shop if you need more hacking tools.

398fc36444fb09a8eef4ddd75421a023a47056c9.speaker: Stella Chion
398fc36444fb09a8eef4ddd75421a023a47056c9.text_raw: Return to me once you have reach the target.
398fc36444fb09a8eef4ddd75421a023a47056c9.text_normalized: Return to me once you have reach the target.

0a0045d7ff0db568146a2b1f7ea1483fb30d91c0.speaker: ECHO
0a0045d7ff0db568146a2b1f7ea1483fb30d91c0.text_raw: Captain, hacking other stations will work the same as you did with the first station, but the conquest station you are trying to infect has to be adjecent to an already infected station's system.
0a0045d7ff0db568146a2b1f7ea1483fb30d91c0.text_normalized: Captain, hacking other stations will work the same as you did with the first station, but the conquest station you are trying to infect has to be adjecent to an already infected station's system.

cf2f83678cf3b4e4cde9643d78f487cd500d3443.speaker: Umbral
cf2f83678cf3b4e4cde9643d78f487cd500d3443.text_raw: Stella is waiting for you at the outpost. Report to her at once.
cf2f83678cf3b4e4cde9643d78f487cd500d3443.text_normalized: Stella is waiting for you at the outpost. Report to her at once.

990bb1a2ed8354c6c6d6a70b0c734928dd160f1a.speaker: Stella Chion
990bb1a2ed8354c6c6d6a70b0c734928dd160f1a.text_raw: Let's get right to it. We don't know anything about who hired the Omnitac mercs, yet.
990bb1a2ed8354c6c6d6a70b0c734928dd160f1a.text_normalized: Let's get right to it. We don't know anything about who hired the Omnitac mercs, yet.

e5c031fa6e55c0b2282563f979125af1a7cccf38.speaker: Stella Chion
e5c031fa6e55c0b2282563f979125af1a7cccf38.text_raw: What we did discover is the location of several research facilities.
e5c031fa6e55c0b2282563f979125af1a7cccf38.text_normalized: What we did discover is the location of several research facilities.

c382a7165848ab43422c956adafbc718b2154221.speaker: Stella Chion
c382a7165848ab43422c956adafbc718b2154221.text_raw: One for each of the major factions. They are, like us, experimenting on Metafiber.
c382a7165848ab43422c956adafbc718b2154221.text_normalized: One for each of the major factions. They are, like us, experimenting on Metafiber.

57d34a4dcfd0afc4c13b8f68e11e170912bfcc25.speaker: Stella Chion
57d34a4dcfd0afc4c13b8f68e11e170912bfcc25.text_raw: We need their data slates, it would speed up our research by quite a bit.
57d34a4dcfd0afc4c13b8f68e11e170912bfcc25.text_normalized: We need their data slates, it would speed up our research by quite a bit.

6d5530bc537df2e2e7035b167ed6355054194269.speaker: Stella Chion
6d5530bc537df2e2e7035b167ed6355054194269.text_raw: Expect resistance, it should be heavily guarded.
6d5530bc537df2e2e7035b167ed6355054194269.text_normalized: Expect resistance, it should be heavily guarded.

c5c9d635b72057c549c3eba4dc8a229207897483.speaker: Stella Chion
c5c9d635b72057c549c3eba4dc8a229207897483.text_raw: But, all we need are the data slates, which are most likely in the Core part of the station.
c5c9d635b72057c549c3eba4dc8a229207897483.text_normalized: But, all we need are the data slates, which are most likely in the Core part of the station.

42ad48290484582b234abf1f9f328dc5323df6fa.speaker: Stella Chion
42ad48290484582b234abf1f9f328dc5323df6fa.text_raw: I could be an quick and easy snatch job, acquire them however you see fit.
42ad48290484582b234abf1f9f328dc5323df6fa.text_normalized: I could be an quick and easy snatch job, acquire them however you see fit.

7558c341505adc63bbc39e1a104076ab71648594.speaker: Stella Chion
7558c341505adc63bbc39e1a104076ab71648594.text_raw: Return them to me after acquiring them.
7558c341505adc63bbc39e1a104076ab71648594.text_normalized: Return them to me after acquiring them.

2e781c09c67086cfab4608d59c31cb4f373903b9.speaker: ECHO
2e781c09c67086cfab4608d59c31cb4f373903b9.text_raw: Just a friendly reminder captain, Decoy Transponders are available in the Umbral Shops.
2e781c09c67086cfab4608d59c31cb4f373903b9.text_normalized: Just a friendly reminder captain, Decoy Transponders are available in the Umbral Shops.

d734ac7dc2ab0d6cbea5e76fe31071bf3f106528.speaker: Stella Chion
d734ac7dc2ab0d6cbea5e76fe31071bf3f106528.text_raw: These are valuable. I'll send them to our research station at once.
d734ac7dc2ab0d6cbea5e76fe31071bf3f106528.text_normalized: These are valuable. I'll send them to our research station at once.

41eed4bfad691af797e256b129ff61789d691f45.speaker: Stella Chion
41eed4bfad691af797e256b129ff61789d691f45.text_raw: There are not many tasks I can give you, other than the task of further expanding our influence.
41eed4bfad691af797e256b129ff61789d691f45.text_normalized: There are not many tasks I can give you, other than the task of further expanding our influence.

4394f81ec1532d1a6f42af32185c1e8227302c6a.speaker: Stella Chion
4394f81ec1532d1a6f42af32185c1e8227302c6a.text_raw: Get back to me once more stations have been infected.
4394f81ec1532d1a6f42af32185c1e8227302c6a.text_normalized: Get back to me once more stations have been infected.

a2513e714ba04696a91552d353da65397c5aef79.speaker: Umbral
a2513e714ba04696a91552d353da65397c5aef79.text_raw: Captain, you are going at a great pace!
a2513e714ba04696a91552d353da65397c5aef79.text_normalized: Captain, you are going at a great pace!

7199efde6200c719c77f929b3ae2f7ef38b62b09.speaker: captain
7199efde6200c719c77f929b3ae2f7ef38b62b09.text_raw: Can't you hire more personnel? I feel like I'm carrying this team, and I'm the only one in this team.
7199efde6200c719c77f929b3ae2f7ef38b62b09.text_normalized: Can't you hire more personnel? I feel like I'm carrying this team, and I'm the only one in this team.

b0192c4bfb1ee4029b9520375979fd939d82e695.speaker: Stella Chion
b0192c4bfb1ee4029b9520375979fd939d82e695.text_raw: We have located another Metafiber Data Slate, or at least know of it.
b0192c4bfb1ee4029b9520375979fd939d82e695.text_normalized: We have located another Metafiber Data Slate, or at least know of it.

f10ca11bbeba3516eb8460444a02e172419a8130.speaker: Stella Chion
f10ca11bbeba3516eb8460444a02e172419a8130.text_raw: Our agents gathered it will be transported soon.
f10ca11bbeba3516eb8460444a02e172419a8130.text_normalized: Our agents gathered it will be transported soon.

6660469e2847c5212769a0f5d90e8adb667bc43f.speaker: captain
6660469e2847c5212769a0f5d90e8adb667bc43f.text_raw: I thought you were allies with them?
6660469e2847c5212769a0f5d90e8adb667bc43f.text_normalized: I thought you were allies with them?

078ce29231497e5811e35f752d6514ada42f9958.speaker: Stella Chion
078ce29231497e5811e35f752d6514ada42f9958.text_raw: Allies? With all of them? Do you know how much that would cost?
078ce29231497e5811e35f752d6514ada42f9958.text_normalized: Allies? With all of them? Do you know how much that would cost?

6bf268473f2c1fbdacaf2b3a334d7520c9057482.speaker: Stella Chion
6bf268473f2c1fbdacaf2b3a334d7520c9057482.text_raw: Yes, you would need special Void Drifter Commendations, and those do not exist, thank the oracle.
6bf268473f2c1fbdacaf2b3a334d7520c9057482.text_normalized: Yes, you would need special Void Drifter Commendations, and those do not exist, thank the oracle.

d5fc7f46350cc7459f77f2cf674e2e9e0a722e18.speaker: Stella Chion
d5fc7f46350cc7459f77f2cf674e2e9e0a722e18.text_raw: Ahem... so, let's get back to the mission.
d5fc7f46350cc7459f77f2cf674e2e9e0a722e18.text_normalized: Ahem, so, let's get back to the mission.

4049061298c7113034d17e26a7cce8d8390c0c46.speaker: Stella Chion
4049061298c7113034d17e26a7cce8d8390c0c46.text_raw: Our agents have placed a tracker on the ship, so we know where it is.
4049061298c7113034d17e26a7cce8d8390c0c46.text_normalized: Our agents have placed a tracker on the ship, so we know where it is.

2afea6308af3baba1fb8b153eb65d0b3243d89a5.speaker: Stella Chion
2afea6308af3baba1fb8b153eb65d0b3243d89a5.text_raw: Yes, to track ships? How else will you covertly steal their cargo? They are available in most Umbral Shops. Pairs great with Cargo Scanners.
2afea6308af3baba1fb8b153eb65d0b3243d89a5.text_normalized: Yes, to track ships? How else will you covertly steal their cargo? They are available in most Umbral Shops. Pairs great with Cargo Scanners.

9eedc373525baac578a4ed02748448a90828e1cf.speaker: Stella Chion
9eedc373525baac578a4ed02748448a90828e1cf.text_raw: But this ship has already been tagged. Go to the location, and eliminate the ship.
9eedc373525baac578a4ed02748448a90828e1cf.text_normalized: But this ship has already been tagged. Go to the location, and eliminate the ship.

a6d18a08992a24497d08651cc17d247b88b892e1.speaker: Stella Chion
a6d18a08992a24497d08651cc17d247b88b892e1.text_raw: Thank you for delivering the slate, good job as always.
a6d18a08992a24497d08651cc17d247b88b892e1.text_normalized: Thank you for delivering the slate, good job as always.

4b3ce24a889b1ed8b017033abcac3b586bc5a994.speaker: Stella Chion
4b3ce24a889b1ed8b017033abcac3b586bc5a994.text_raw: I'll send it off to get experimented upon.
4b3ce24a889b1ed8b017033abcac3b586bc5a994.text_normalized: I'll send it off to get experimented upon.

cb5af94fe62e965902193d4084ac528ff09f66c7.speaker: Stella Chion
cb5af94fe62e965902193d4084ac528ff09f66c7.text_raw: This should be the missing piece, we have everything we need.
cb5af94fe62e965902193d4084ac528ff09f66c7.text_normalized: This should be the missing piece, we have everything we need.

713db0804be0611bf340e9a5332c94dc5bbadbcc.speaker: captain
713db0804be0611bf340e9a5332c94dc5bbadbcc.text_raw: What are you trying to achieve, anyways?
713db0804be0611bf340e9a5332c94dc5bbadbcc.text_normalized: What are you trying to achieve, anyways?

3d778985fe0cf33c947121846393aa49cf3f640c.speaker: Stella Chion
3d778985fe0cf33c947121846393aa49cf3f640c.text_raw: That would be not for me to spill, Captain...
3d778985fe0cf33c947121846393aa49cf3f640c.text_normalized: That would be not for me to spill, Captain.

9107c874c10198bba08974f4b664093fd361c930.speaker: Stella Chion
9107c874c10198bba08974f4b664093fd361c930.text_raw: Let's distract you with a reward.
9107c874c10198bba08974f4b664093fd361c930.text_normalized: Let's distract you with a reward.

38799fa6c1051a23733bdb59264d21a71454da6a.speaker: Stella Chion
38799fa6c1051a23733bdb59264d21a71454da6a.text_raw: There is something waiting for you in your hangar.
38799fa6c1051a23733bdb59264d21a71454da6a.text_normalized: There is something waiting for you in your hangar.

507f446099ede28cb02890381b5ca8fb4292a91f.speaker: Stella Chion
507f446099ede28cb02890381b5ca8fb4292a91f.text_raw: It's an old design. A stripped down Eclipse, high travel speed, decent turrets but... somewhat lower protection values.
507f446099ede28cb02890381b5ca8fb4292a91f.text_normalized: It's an old design. A stripped down Eclipse, high travel speed, decent turrets but, somewhat lower protection values.

a550a2c167da9bd497f49648d28e9b1beb98e387.speaker: Stella Chion
a550a2c167da9bd497f49648d28e9b1beb98e387.text_raw: Even has a small dronebay. You know, for drones.
a550a2c167da9bd497f49648d28e9b1beb98e387.text_normalized: Even has a small dronebay. You know, for drones.

08d32e4f8969db2c803647c0e44c40bdaa5a3c21.speaker: Stella Chion
08d32e4f8969db2c803647c0e44c40bdaa5a3c21.text_raw: Get back to infecting stations, Captain.
08d32e4f8969db2c803647c0e44c40bdaa5a3c21.text_normalized: Get back to infecting stations, Captain.

5b622893da8527d39f40d9577bb2775a21ffe1aa.speaker: captain
5b622893da8527d39f40d9577bb2775a21ffe1aa.text_raw: First, I'm checking out the hangar!
5b622893da8527d39f40d9577bb2775a21ffe1aa.text_normalized: First, I'm checking out the hangar!

a90904a6293e748134acae7473221b081059a740.speaker: ECHO
a90904a6293e748134acae7473221b081059a740.text_raw: We will have to wait for a game update to progress this mission, Captain.
a90904a6293e748134acae7473221b081059a740.text_normalized: We will have to wait for a game update to progress this mission, Captain.

a1cc97d773331d54fd4d114e560dfdc2c5bb0fff.speaker: Stella Chion
a1cc97d773331d54fd4d114e560dfdc2c5bb0fff.text_raw: Ah!! You startled me. Don't sneak up on me like that.
a1cc97d773331d54fd4d114e560dfdc2c5bb0fff.text_normalized: Ah!! You startled me. Don't sneak up on me like that.

5c62522c8b0a79e9252ca1103b7568c2708f4f04.speaker: captain
5c62522c8b0a79e9252ca1103b7568c2708f4f04.text_raw: Isn't that what I'm supposed to do, being all sneaky like?
5c62522c8b0a79e9252ca1103b7568c2708f4f04.text_normalized: Isn't that what I'm supposed to do, being all sneaky like?

813c6567e563c642197c22d2527445587ec5cb7c.speaker: Stella Chion
813c6567e563c642197c22d2527445587ec5cb7c.text_raw: Yes, but don't try it out on me! Get going!
813c6567e563c642197c22d2527445587ec5cb7c.text_normalized: Yes, but don't try it out on me! Get going!

e0a47053802b34493df79b305ce450d2369ff41a.speaker: ECHO
e0a47053802b34493df79b305ce450d2369ff41a.text_raw: It is a Terravex-class Destroyer, captain. Shiny!
e0a47053802b34493df79b305ce450d2369ff41a.text_normalized: It is a Terravex-class Destroyer, captain. Shiny!

fa6206d701d78400e57baef92a46a513ff8d2dda.speaker: Midas
fa6206d701d78400e57baef92a46a513ff8d2dda.text_raw: Thank you. As you may have spotted, Meridia has upped its efforts, expanding further and further.
fa6206d701d78400e57baef92a46a513ff8d2dda.text_normalized: Thank you. As you may have spotted, Meridia has upped its efforts, expanding further and further.

b12ef3979c03e08421bff7ba49dc03c252760b7a.speaker: captain
b12ef3979c03e08421bff7ba49dc03c252760b7a.text_raw: Yes yes, I need to halt their expansion, and I will get rewarded. Right?
b12ef3979c03e08421bff7ba49dc03c252760b7a.text_normalized: Yes yes, I need to halt their expansion, and I will get rewarded. Right?

f9609dfaa01024adcc94e16f9adff87c2201e688.speaker: Midas
f9609dfaa01024adcc94e16f9adff87c2201e688.text_raw: Even if they don't hold any territory, these filths endlessly try to gather more souls for their overlord.
f9609dfaa01024adcc94e16f9adff87c2201e688.text_normalized: Even if they don't hold any territory, these filths endlessly try to gather more souls for their overlord.

ad232ca33cad7c0643128eab943ffe4f7bbe547b.speaker: Midas
ad232ca33cad7c0643128eab943ffe4f7bbe547b.text_raw: We will send you on a small campaign, disrupting them the best we can.
ad232ca33cad7c0643128eab943ffe4f7bbe547b.text_normalized: We will send you on a small campaign, disrupting them the best we can.

fa9abbbe87ebfb9bd667d98b47ab62ba8d74282a.speaker: Midas
fa9abbbe87ebfb9bd667d98b47ab62ba8d74282a.text_raw: So... your task... we know where some prominent political figures are being transported. If we can terminate them, we deal a great blow to their propaganda machine.
fa9abbbe87ebfb9bd667d98b47ab62ba8d74282a.text_normalized: So, your task, we know where some prominent political figures are being transported. If we can terminate them, we deal a great blow to their propaganda machine.

e81ded12ada44910896d6e23618358f274365034.speaker: Midas
e81ded12ada44910896d6e23618358f274365034.text_raw: They will be traveling to an outpost. Destroy it! Their departure point is logged at the station they are inbound from.
e81ded12ada44910896d6e23618358f274365034.text_normalized: They will be traveling to an outpost. Destroy it! Their departure point is logged at the station they are inbound from.

fb765a1b9a4b29b3257f83b969fedf1b12ed2fef.speaker: Midas
fb765a1b9a4b29b3257f83b969fedf1b12ed2fef.text_raw: I'll see what forces I can spare. But you seem quite capable.
fb765a1b9a4b29b3257f83b969fedf1b12ed2fef.text_normalized: I'll see what forces I can spare. But you seem quite capable.

a27a8d7fcada0c702b44ad8d5ecdf7dc655f6f6c.speaker: Midas
a27a8d7fcada0c702b44ad8d5ecdf7dc655f6f6c.text_raw: Oh, just so you know... your reputation with the Compact here is not important to me. I'd rather you fix it, but my task is the protection of the core systems from the threat out of Meridia.
a27a8d7fcada0c702b44ad8d5ecdf7dc655f6f6c.text_normalized: Oh, just so you know, your reputation with the Compact here is not important to me. I'd rather you fix it, but my task is the protection of the core systems from the threat out of Meridia.

bfc70a7f2d638686d78d9db364031988ac7540dd.speaker: Midas
bfc70a7f2d638686d78d9db364031988ac7540dd.text_raw: That's it! Freeze in the nothingness you cowards!
bfc70a7f2d638686d78d9db364031988ac7540dd.text_normalized: That's it! Freeze in the nothingness you cowards!

011a08204ea3d8f60bd45ab58df825d238f6e0e5.speaker: Midas
011a08204ea3d8f60bd45ab58df825d238f6e0e5.text_raw: Good job, now get over to the next location and continue your crusade!
011a08204ea3d8f60bd45ab58df825d238f6e0e5.text_normalized: Good job, now get over to the next location and continue your crusade!

1936a88485e85aaec0ea4e8578ba58168d91c398.speaker: captain
1936a88485e85aaec0ea4e8578ba58168d91c398.text_raw: I feel like it's more your crusade... but yes, on it!
1936a88485e85aaec0ea4e8578ba58168d91c398.text_normalized: I feel like it's more your crusade, but yes, on it!

f82af2a7628f2847075745f09011fbabcf49d0b5.speaker: Midas
f82af2a7628f2847075745f09011fbabcf49d0b5.text_raw: Finally! The damage those monsters would've done would be immense.
f82af2a7628f2847075745f09011fbabcf49d0b5.text_normalized: Finally! The damage those monsters would've done would be immense.

dded10a535826fa721eac721409c3294fc1ebbd0.speaker: Midas
dded10a535826fa721eac721409c3294fc1ebbd0.text_raw: It dropped some of their discs as well.
dded10a535826fa721eac721409c3294fc1ebbd0.text_normalized: It dropped some of their discs as well.

4c9a9a0fbbe641bf452f407090d19bd253dc55f8.speaker: Midas
4c9a9a0fbbe641bf452f407090d19bd253dc55f8.text_raw: I suggest not viewing the discs, just sell them at an Intertrade Trade Terminal.
4c9a9a0fbbe641bf452f407090d19bd253dc55f8.text_normalized: I suggest not viewing the discs, just sell them at an Intertrade Trade Terminal.

2b075940af6213d9add46f9b62401a0b6a59d741.speaker: Midas
2b075940af6213d9add46f9b62401a0b6a59d741.text_raw: We want to eliminate more figures within their hierarchy.
2b075940af6213d9add46f9b62401a0b6a59d741.text_normalized: We want to eliminate more figures within their hierarchy.

ec10b08cf4ee2f45ef02a9233ac8d8bbfa5e61ea.speaker: Midas
ec10b08cf4ee2f45ef02a9233ac8d8bbfa5e61ea.text_raw: If you could draw them out, by let's say sabotaging their economy... their mining and salvage operations...
ec10b08cf4ee2f45ef02a9233ac8d8bbfa5e61ea.text_normalized: If you could draw them out, by let's say sabotaging their economy, their mining and salvage operations.

d7297e7937563260857b3d1d5474dcda50edddd8.speaker: Midas
d7297e7937563260857b3d1d5474dcda50edddd8.text_raw: ... that would garner attention from some more elite forces, and dealing with them would hurt their morale quite a bit.
d7297e7937563260857b3d1d5474dcda50edddd8.text_normalized: , that would garner attention from some more elite forces, and dealing with them would hurt their morale quite a bit.

71d267f1eda479c781bd4a403a9fa012411a05d6.speaker: Midas
71d267f1eda479c781bd4a403a9fa012411a05d6.text_raw: I've marked the location of a mining operation on your map. Your first target. Eliminate the miners.
71d267f1eda479c781bd4a403a9fa012411a05d6.text_normalized: I've marked the location of a mining operation on your map. Your first target. Eliminate the miners.

0baae46cfd34f67c0275cac222da2b5f5f007bf1.speaker: Midas
0baae46cfd34f67c0275cac222da2b5f5f007bf1.text_raw: Could be a quick hit and run, but they could send reinforcements.
0baae46cfd34f67c0275cac222da2b5f5f007bf1.text_normalized: Could be a quick hit and run, but they could send reinforcements.

6ac6619b4dfa1e069a9a4701fc019252c2e0562e.speaker: ECHO
6ac6619b4dfa1e069a9a4701fc019252c2e0562e.text_raw: Captain, amongst the loot I also scanned a beacon... handy, in this situation.
6ac6619b4dfa1e069a9a4701fc019252c2e0562e.text_normalized: Captain, amongst the loot I also scanned a beacon, handy, in this situation.

49da2a60b6a79e829424043813200491ff88e81b.speaker: Midas
49da2a60b6a79e829424043813200491ff88e81b.text_raw: Good. The miners have been dealt with.
49da2a60b6a79e829424043813200491ff88e81b.text_normalized: Good. The miners have been dealt with.

57be2d8b0d3fde55663b54c7349823285ac7c2d3.speaker: ECHO
57be2d8b0d3fde55663b54c7349823285ac7c2d3.text_raw: Easy targets. Just how I like them.
57be2d8b0d3fde55663b54c7349823285ac7c2d3.text_normalized: Easy targets. Just how I like them.

80510e82624d22d4c0dfd950630058aede5a7591.speaker: Midas
80510e82624d22d4c0dfd950630058aede5a7591.text_raw: Right.. next up is a salvaging operation, same idea.
80510e82624d22d4c0dfd950630058aede5a7591.text_normalized: Right, next up is a salvaging operation, same idea.

e085c20a7074444ac6efc1b17e7508be076f06b4.speaker: captain
e085c20a7074444ac6efc1b17e7508be076f06b4.text_raw: No explanation needed, going there right away! Let me check the map first... what?! All the way over there...
e085c20a7074444ac6efc1b17e7508be076f06b4.text_normalized: No explanation needed, going there right away! Let me check the map first, what?! All the way over there.

b778c4eea92a74bc2ec5c78ce9b70ebea4091152.speaker: captain
b778c4eea92a74bc2ec5c78ce9b70ebea4091152.text_raw: Easy targets. Just how I like them.
b778c4eea92a74bc2ec5c78ce9b70ebea4091152.text_normalized: Easy targets. Just how I like them.

63403d2f793e87bf9f502f830d407cd168200599.speaker: captain
63403d2f793e87bf9f502f830d407cd168200599.text_raw: No it's not, I'll talk to you later about it ECHO!
63403d2f793e87bf9f502f830d407cd168200599.text_normalized: No it's not, I'll talk to you later about it ECHO!

408714510a2b46858ddd6e7945dfaac3b07238de.speaker: Midas
408714510a2b46858ddd6e7945dfaac3b07238de.text_raw: I... ok... Well, I've picked up a signal that the Meridia commanders have been deployed.
408714510a2b46858ddd6e7945dfaac3b07238de.text_normalized: I, ok. Well, I've picked up a signal that the Meridia commanders have been deployed.

82d12387ee70e04d3dbb1f3c7cb0f91f05387035.speaker: Midas
82d12387ee70e04d3dbb1f3c7cb0f91f05387035.text_raw: My forces have managed to put trackers on them. Very convenient for you, Captain.
82d12387ee70e04d3dbb1f3c7cb0f91f05387035.text_normalized: My forces have managed to put trackers on them. Very convenient for you, Captain.

55b7732c7dafdb243b5ab88f4a605f957d7ef41d.speaker: Midas
55b7732c7dafdb243b5ab88f4a605f957d7ef41d.text_raw: A slight warning, these are not ordinary captains, so be prepared for quite a fight.
55b7732c7dafdb243b5ab88f4a605f957d7ef41d.text_normalized: A slight warning, these are not ordinary captains, so be prepared for quite a fight.

f1f55baca895dc390efea078cf5eb9d17cd62d96.speaker: Midas
f1f55baca895dc390efea078cf5eb9d17cd62d96.text_raw: We've marked the location on your map as to where they can be intercepted.
f1f55baca895dc390efea078cf5eb9d17cd62d96.text_normalized: We've marked the location on your map as to where they can be intercepted.

5b2b7d33c1963353eac0876438d7d3ac80cf38ef.speaker: captain
5b2b7d33c1963353eac0876438d7d3ac80cf38ef.text_raw: Got it, we'll go in prepared.
5b2b7d33c1963353eac0876438d7d3ac80cf38ef.text_normalized: Got it, we'll go in prepared.

ad27156d0e257d8549f3606a5155b39276ecba21.speaker: Midas
ad27156d0e257d8549f3606a5155b39276ecba21.text_raw: Let me guess... Easy targets. Just how you like them?
ad27156d0e257d8549f3606a5155b39276ecba21.text_normalized: Let me guess. Easy targets. Just how you like them?

3f4f9e304be3572ea77ddb354a6a027c90e060e4.speaker: Midas
3f4f9e304be3572ea77ddb354a6a027c90e060e4.text_raw: I'm joking... this is quite the accomplishment. With them gone, it will bring internal chaos. Even more than is standard for them.
3f4f9e304be3572ea77ddb354a6a027c90e060e4.text_normalized: I'm joking, this is quite the accomplishment. With them gone, it will bring internal chaos. Even more than is standard for them.

efc36a30d22f91ec03d6cb90991367d7cbe6609f.speaker: Midas
efc36a30d22f91ec03d6cb90991367d7cbe6609f.text_raw: You have helped us out greatly.
efc36a30d22f91ec03d6cb90991367d7cbe6609f.text_normalized: You have helped us out greatly.

4f84231b8188031a8550439e4d84eaadb1ac476a.speaker: Midas
4f84231b8188031a8550439e4d84eaadb1ac476a.text_raw: I have another request, and it is a big one... it's something which needs to happen before we can proceed further towards Meridia.
4f84231b8188031a8550439e4d84eaadb1ac476a.text_normalized: I have another request, and it is a big one, it's something which needs to happen before we can proceed further towards Meridia.

d4e555ab7d268297235f5d663e13c6c9b0e97270.speaker: Midas
d4e555ab7d268297235f5d663e13c6c9b0e97270.text_raw: But let's take a breather... you do seem to be entitled to a reward, at this stage.
d4e555ab7d268297235f5d663e13c6c9b0e97270.text_normalized: But let's take a breather, you do seem to be entitled to a reward, at this stage.

6c44c86a32b667d8ded4499d1683d25446cf3301.speaker: Midas
6c44c86a32b667d8ded4499d1683d25446cf3301.text_raw: We can't give it to you completely for free, so let's make it a trade.
6c44c86a32b667d8ded4499d1683d25446cf3301.text_normalized: We can't give it to you completely for free, so let's make it a trade.

b07af90c685654c5f565d8a9368cc0674475ff7a.speaker: Midas
b07af90c685654c5f565d8a9368cc0674475ff7a.text_raw: We need certain materials. Bring them to the Darkspace Embassy.
b07af90c685654c5f565d8a9368cc0674475ff7a.text_normalized: We need certain materials. Bring them to the Darkspace Embassy.

c0f477c3456e9b2a0ad013d7388de49e09eee304.speaker: Midas
c0f477c3456e9b2a0ad013d7388de49e09eee304.text_raw: Here's the gate pass to our embassy sector.
c0f477c3456e9b2a0ad013d7388de49e09eee304.text_normalized: Here's the gate pass to our embassy sector.

7f980221a8bc85cb8a8c4602d009be28596b106a.speaker: captain
7f980221a8bc85cb8a8c4602d009be28596b106a.text_raw: But what are we trading for? Just materials?
7f980221a8bc85cb8a8c4602d009be28596b106a.text_normalized: But what are we trading for? Just materials?

258635ced6730d6001b63dddea604ab3b7c1be5b.speaker: Midas
258635ced6730d6001b63dddea604ab3b7c1be5b.text_raw: No, and a ship of course!
258635ced6730d6001b63dddea604ab3b7c1be5b.text_normalized: No, and a ship of course!

34faabe3b2ec3eed7dff3bbc71e8a18e39a0ecc0.speaker: ECHO
34faabe3b2ec3eed7dff3bbc71e8a18e39a0ecc0.text_raw: Exciting! Captain, Intertrade stations have missions that exchange materials, in case we're missing something specific.
34faabe3b2ec3eed7dff3bbc71e8a18e39a0ecc0.text_normalized: Exciting! Captain, Intertrade stations have missions that exchange materials, in case we're missing something specific.

f3045594d225e40c12947b321b598d5441a7faba.speaker: Midas
f3045594d225e40c12947b321b598d5441a7faba.text_raw: Material transfer completed. Have fun, Captain! You'll find the ship in your hangar.
f3045594d225e40c12947b321b598d5441a7faba.text_normalized: Material transfer completed. Have fun, Captain! You'll find the ship in your hangar.

eaf96ec05cb4bbc4ab21dad8b94d26707875baac.speaker: Midas
eaf96ec05cb4bbc4ab21dad8b94d26707875baac.text_raw: You'll need to install modules and turrets for the coming fight, or well... fights.
eaf96ec05cb4bbc4ab21dad8b94d26707875baac.text_normalized: You'll need to install modules and turrets for the coming fight, or well, fights.

d17184c2487b30da88e11301746c25489151dc08.speaker: captain
d17184c2487b30da88e11301746c25489151dc08.text_raw: Yes, we need to calibrate the targeting of the new ship.
d17184c2487b30da88e11301746c25489151dc08.text_normalized: Yes, we need to calibrate the targeting of the new ship.

769d00cfe4fcb5a5077ce816ced67a7929a5e5c4.speaker: Midas
769d00cfe4fcb5a5077ce816ced67a7929a5e5c4.text_raw: We will entrust you with the following objective: eliminate Meridia from the conquest sector.
769d00cfe4fcb5a5077ce816ced67a7929a5e5c4.text_normalized: We will entrust you with the following objective: eliminate Meridia from the conquest sector.

9133492d15eb3966f3471e958dbdb7be8f42c835.speaker: captain
9133492d15eb3966f3471e958dbdb7be8f42c835.text_raw: Well, that is quite a bit of calibrating...
9133492d15eb3966f3471e958dbdb7be8f42c835.text_normalized: Well, that is quite a bit of calibrating.

3c611497019d0bc6f6eda3d8c8adffd41950ec51.speaker: Midas
3c611497019d0bc6f6eda3d8c8adffd41950ec51.text_raw: It's something which none of us could achieve, but you are a different breed. Not NPC's like us.
3c611497019d0bc6f6eda3d8c8adffd41950ec51.text_normalized: It's something which none of us could achieve, but you are a different breed. Not NPC's like us.

f8e0eb7535ecd3cd982ccf259379f38b45350433.speaker: captain
f8e0eb7535ecd3cd982ccf259379f38b45350433.text_raw: Don't say that! ECHO is an NPC and did most of the work!
f8e0eb7535ecd3cd982ccf259379f38b45350433.text_normalized: Don't say that! ECHO is an NPC and did most of the work!

89e54e3fd8a20a0aa868fa0034f25cc8f1c0ea99.speaker: Midas
89e54e3fd8a20a0aa868fa0034f25cc8f1c0ea99.text_raw: Non Powerful Captain, I meant. What are you on about?
89e54e3fd8a20a0aa868fa0034f25cc8f1c0ea99.text_normalized: Non Powerful Captain, I meant. What are you on about?

9fd348d16fe5001e8f3a82102a3b59ebf958f314.speaker: Midas
9fd348d16fe5001e8f3a82102a3b59ebf958f314.text_raw: ... give me some time to come up with a new task for you.
9fd348d16fe5001e8f3a82102a3b59ebf958f314.text_normalized: , give me some time to come up with a new task for you.

4483f0363960cdbabc168c6c961ef6b4f1018d58.speaker: Midas
4483f0363960cdbabc168c6c961ef6b4f1018d58.text_raw: Not right now Captain, I'm busy.
4483f0363960cdbabc168c6c961ef6b4f1018d58.text_normalized: Not right now Captain, I'm busy.

ffd12e4ec287b2fb65724307f55d0a98d56a7407.speaker: ECHO
ffd12e4ec287b2fb65724307f55d0a98d56a7407.text_raw: Hull integrity is compromised. Several systems are offline. My AI core has sustained damage.
ffd12e4ec287b2fb65724307f55d0a98d56a7407.text_normalized: Hull integrity is compromised. Several systems are offline. My AI core has sustained damage.

ee2655f7f3cb1d1b4cce5af0a47e02e4ec2110e7.speaker: ECHO
ee2655f7f3cb1d1b4cce5af0a47e02e4ec2110e7.text_raw: Repairs will require external support, preferably a station.
ee2655f7f3cb1d1b4cce5af0a47e02e4ec2110e7.text_normalized: Repairs will require external support, preferably a station.

06628d8bf72f045a4e3e36640ed22dc2e714cebf.speaker: ECHO
06628d8bf72f045a4e3e36640ed22dc2e714cebf.text_raw: You don't look too good either. Your learning implant seems to be... reset.
06628d8bf72f045a4e3e36640ed22dc2e714cebf.text_normalized: You don't look too good either. Your learning implant seems to be, reset.

ae3f85824286245dc8ca28115452b0372cf4b268.speaker: ECHO
ae3f85824286245dc8ca28115452b0372cf4b268.text_raw: And to top it off, we've lost the cargo... including all the Plasma Cells we had.
ae3f85824286245dc8ca28115452b0372cf4b268.text_normalized: And to top it off, we've lost the cargo, including all the Plasma Cells we had.

083dc3a180087ccee232f295f8700bc9244c29ce.speaker: captain
083dc3a180087ccee232f295f8700bc9244c29ce.text_raw: Well... What about navigation? Can we set a course?
083dc3a180087ccee232f295f8700bc9244c29ce.text_normalized: Well. What about navigation? Can we set a course?

cdcbde19f58704638442df1fb976bf69f1802224.speaker: ECHO
cdcbde19f58704638442df1fb976bf69f1802224.text_raw: Negative. Navigation is down. I'm attempting a reboot.
cdcbde19f58704638442df1fb976bf69f1802224.text_normalized: Negative. Navigation is down. I'm attempting a reboot.

f2261fea8db5cc3d69d2a93209c3699dc34f3a6c.speaker: ECHO
f2261fea8db5cc3d69d2a93209c3699dc34f3a6c.text_raw: In the meantime, see if engines, targeting and tractoring are still functional.
f2261fea8db5cc3d69d2a93209c3699dc34f3a6c.text_normalized: In the meantime, see if engines, targeting and tractoring are still functional.

ec09e42d4c6c7bc71f054184ada8d62891baea71.speaker: ECHO
ec09e42d4c6c7bc71f054184ada8d62891baea71.text_raw: Captain, engines are operational. Tractor module is operational. Auto-targeting needs calibration.
ec09e42d4c6c7bc71f054184ada8d62891baea71.text_normalized: Captain, engines are operational. Tractor module is operational. Auto-targeting needs calibration.

8c6731b103c48a72683e678727f198fb7faada52.speaker: ECHO
8c6731b103c48a72683e678727f198fb7faada52.text_raw: I managed to recover one skill point.
8c6731b103c48a72683e678727f198fb7faada52.text_normalized: I managed to recover one skill point.

831d2a9e301bbf8f3e9d7726aa329e6294443142.speaker: ECHO
831d2a9e301bbf8f3e9d7726aa329e6294443142.text_raw: Navigation's still down. I'm working on it. Finish calibrating the tractor in the meantime.
831d2a9e301bbf8f3e9d7726aa329e6294443142.text_normalized: Navigation's still down. I'm working on it. Finish calibrating the tractor in the meantime.

ca6d34978e1fd549d97f1b430c2b415a71be2d94.speaker: ECHO
ca6d34978e1fd549d97f1b430c2b415a71be2d94.text_raw: Tractor module auto-targeting is back online, Captain.
ca6d34978e1fd549d97f1b430c2b415a71be2d94.text_normalized: Tractor module auto-targeting is back online, Captain.

b6548391a2e1ffb8472507500ae605018b6455ea.speaker: ECHO
b6548391a2e1ffb8472507500ae605018b6455ea.text_raw: Navigation is partially restored. I've located an outpost called Driftlight Station.
b6548391a2e1ffb8472507500ae605018b6455ea.text_normalized: Navigation is partially restored. I've located an outpost called Driftlight Station.

c15be64d51f6316faa7fab4c310fe843c767f6cd.speaker: captain
c15be64d51f6316faa7fab4c310fe843c767f6cd.text_raw: Good. Can you set a course now?
c15be64d51f6316faa7fab4c310fe843c767f6cd.text_normalized: Good. Can you set a course now?

33181a1b60014463a11954bca3d274a3bb591123.speaker: ECHO
33181a1b60014463a11954bca3d274a3bb591123.text_raw: Negative. Manual input required. Tap the map icon on your panel, or press 'M' on your control pad.
33181a1b60014463a11954bca3d274a3bb591123.text_normalized: Negative. Manual input required. Tap the map icon on your panel, or press 'M' on your control pad.

0fc417e71de83880a9fc20489a2e91499dfed732.speaker: Greg
0fc417e71de83880a9fc20489a2e91499dfed732.text_raw: It's a good thing you ended up here, Captain.
0fc417e71de83880a9fc20489a2e91499dfed732.text_normalized: It's a good thing you ended up here, Captain.

32731b7ccb47d8827bfd87b18e48e80e06ff26e1.speaker: Greg
32731b7ccb47d8827bfd87b18e48e80e06ff26e1.text_raw: Others aren't so lucky. Some end up into the lower systems, pirate territory.
32731b7ccb47d8827bfd87b18e48e80e06ff26e1.text_normalized: Others aren't so lucky. Some end up into the lower systems, pirate territory.

e708631566a3f426c9326610ca154a5f5d27df98.speaker: Greg
e708631566a3f426c9326610ca154a5f5d27df98.text_raw: Out there, it's join up or get scrapped for parts.
e708631566a3f426c9326610ca154a5f5d27df98.text_normalized: Out there, it's join up or get scrapped for parts.

38c13285fbcaf4b9e570ad1405a0bb66b6d9bac3.speaker: Greg
38c13285fbcaf4b9e570ad1405a0bb66b6d9bac3.text_raw: And that working ECHO of yours? That'd light up every scanner in the sector.
38c13285fbcaf4b9e570ad1405a0bb66b6d9bac3.text_normalized: And that working ECHO of yours? That'd light up every scanner in the sector.

1f243e7bad8e5156329e967add975c763a20bbdd.speaker: Greg
1f243e7bad8e5156329e967add975c763a20bbdd.text_raw: The Great Gate? That's what they're calling it now?
1f243e7bad8e5156329e967add975c763a20bbdd.text_normalized: The Great Gate? That's what they're calling it now?

31c3e0df8f13cab70483e59f3e79b4361463e9e6.speaker: Greg
31c3e0df8f13cab70483e59f3e79b4361463e9e6.text_raw: By the looks of your ship, I'm guessing you're here for repairs.
31c3e0df8f13cab70483e59f3e79b4361463e9e6.text_normalized: By the looks of your ship, I'm guessing you're here for repairs.

57b87cd9fe8df004dcc08e71f1d721d1d002dc4a.speaker: captain
57b87cd9fe8df004dcc08e71f1d721d1d002dc4a.text_raw: It's not just the ship. My ECHO system took a beating too.
57b87cd9fe8df004dcc08e71f1d721d1d002dc4a.text_normalized: It's not just the ship. My ECHO system took a beating too.

d43c0dbe42e62655fa57f276f3796705463a84cc.speaker: Greg
d43c0dbe42e62655fa57f276f3796705463a84cc.text_raw: An ECHO? You still have a working one?!
d43c0dbe42e62655fa57f276f3796705463a84cc.text_normalized: An ECHO? You still have a working one?!

94b091b5f62aa87a40ef0c8f8e7a39ea7ceacdaf.speaker: ECHO
94b091b5f62aa87a40ef0c8f8e7a39ea7ceacdaf.text_raw: Affirmative... However, my AI Core was damaged during the jump.
94b091b5f62aa87a40ef0c8f8e7a39ea7ceacdaf.text_normalized: Affirmative. However, my AI Core was damaged during the jump.

46cd475121ccda2e7b973590902f7235915aee4a.speaker: Greg
46cd475121ccda2e7b973590902f7235915aee4a.text_raw: That is quite rare... first things first: head over to your personal hangar to fix your ship a bit quicker. The auto-repairs will do the job, but it seems like you are in a hurry.
46cd475121ccda2e7b973590902f7235915aee4a.text_normalized: That is quite rare, first things first: head over to your personal hangar to fix your ship a bit quicker. The auto-repairs will do the job, but it seems like you are in a hurry.

bdeeeed64cc1fa4a76513e095c58a05ba1a15050.speaker: Greg
bdeeeed64cc1fa4a76513e095c58a05ba1a15050.text_raw: While you're waiting for repairs... install this new turret. Yours isn't up to par. Once you're done, come talk to me again.
bdeeeed64cc1fa4a76513e095c58a05ba1a15050.text_normalized: While you're waiting for repairs, install this new turret. Yours isn't up to par. Once you're done, come talk to me again.

2cdeb16419649008347471cafd085c62545a0267.speaker: captain
2cdeb16419649008347471cafd085c62545a0267.text_raw: Thanks. Any chance we could take a look at
2cdeb16419649008347471cafd085c62545a0267.text_normalized: Thanks. Any chance we could take a look at

afd64c8254d16391cdfc1b597bcbbc09137fd567.speaker: Greg
afd64c8254d16391cdfc1b597bcbbc09137fd567.text_raw: I could take a look, but I won't be much help. You'll need a engineer for that, and there aren't any around here.
afd64c8254d16391cdfc1b597bcbbc09137fd567.text_normalized: I could take a look, but I won't be much help. You'll need a engineer for that, and there aren't any around here.

691d113a529e6213ed15ff9e6d76ec91beb39930.speaker: Greg
691d113a529e6213ed15ff9e6d76ec91beb39930.text_raw: I do have an idea of where you might find one, but first, you'll need to return the favor.
691d113a529e6213ed15ff9e6d76ec91beb39930.text_normalized: I do have an idea of where you might find one, but first, you'll need to return the favor.

ad412e082982d2369770766c8e53d7aaced5fa2e.speaker: captain
ad412e082982d2369770766c8e53d7aaced5fa2e.text_raw: Alright, I'm sure we can manage. Well... I can manage.
ad412e082982d2369770766c8e53d7aaced5fa2e.text_normalized: Alright, I'm sure we can manage. Well, I can manage.

6be1863b33538e13813e3922ae8b4aba4ddea3af.speaker: Greg
6be1863b33538e13813e3922ae8b4aba4ddea3af.text_raw: I'll even give this plasma cell and a jumpgate pass to get you to the next system.
6be1863b33538e13813e3922ae8b4aba4ddea3af.text_normalized: I'll even give this plasma cell and a jumpgate pass to get you to the next system.

c2fe783d889cc0ac44342d1cf0ed3aa9f14589e4.speaker: Greg
c2fe783d889cc0ac44342d1cf0ed3aa9f14589e4.text_raw: Oh, and also... you can use the armory (global) and material storage (local) to make room in your cargo hold.
c2fe783d889cc0ac44342d1cf0ed3aa9f14589e4.text_normalized: Oh, and also, you can use the armory (global) and material storage (local) to make room in your cargo hold.

e9c80d2aace8f34822f23ff1fbb54e72868b1bba.speaker: captain
e9c80d2aace8f34822f23ff1fbb54e72868b1bba.text_raw: Haven't done this much manual work in years. With ECHO and all...
e9c80d2aace8f34822f23ff1fbb54e72868b1bba.text_normalized: Haven't done this much manual work in years. With ECHO and all.

a19513d8e7ef5d4ad9c18b7d362b364e67dd2657.speaker: Greg
a19513d8e7ef5d4ad9c18b7d362b364e67dd2657.text_raw: Oh, very exhausting indeed... Sitting in the captain's chair, pushing buttons all day...
a19513d8e7ef5d4ad9c18b7d362b364e67dd2657.text_normalized: Oh, very exhausting indeed. Sitting in the captain's chair, pushing buttons all day.

75a82b4f5fe30c3eb38a0e294837ae5c6bcf41e0.speaker: Greg
75a82b4f5fe30c3eb38a0e294837ae5c6bcf41e0.text_raw: Well, let's get you moving along with your journey.
75a82b4f5fe30c3eb38a0e294837ae5c6bcf41e0.text_normalized: Well, let's get you moving along with your journey.

9f9947aca32eabb3f49906a1053725ba9c9e5df3.speaker: Greg
9f9947aca32eabb3f49906a1053725ba9c9e5df3.text_raw: You should be familiar with the jumpgate system, it's the same as what we use back in our galaxy.
9f9947aca32eabb3f49906a1053725ba9c9e5df3.text_normalized: You should be familiar with the jumpgate system, it's the same as what we use back in our galaxy.

cb64b7f41eab0a6c73a9295ccfaa953c604eec6a.speaker: Greg
cb64b7f41eab0a6c73a9295ccfaa953c604eec6a.text_raw: Luckily, for us... a lot of colony ships ended up here carrying the gate constructors.
cb64b7f41eab0a6c73a9295ccfaa953c604eec6a.text_normalized: Luckily, for us, a lot of colony ships ended up here carrying the gate constructors.

4f66f4b6077bd57a66f655e455441f432cac8c5f.speaker: Greg
4f66f4b6077bd57a66f655e455441f432cac8c5f.text_raw: So just jettison the pass at the gate to Orbitan, and it should unlock for you.
4f66f4b6077bd57a66f655e455441f432cac8c5f.text_normalized: So just jettison the pass at the gate to Orbitan, and it should unlock for you.

6c92e0d7f23f17db27e3af0144ca0696c9c4ed7d.speaker: captain
6c92e0d7f23f17db27e3af0144ca0696c9c4ed7d.text_raw: Got it. Jettison the pass at the gate and head to Orbitan.
6c92e0d7f23f17db27e3af0144ca0696c9c4ed7d.text_normalized: Got it. Jettison the pass at the gate and head to Orbitan.

a2b01ea4708f28cdbc8e3ea6bf3961a889d09cca.speaker: ECHO
a2b01ea4708f28cdbc8e3ea6bf3961a889d09cca.text_raw: Captain, I will remind you, just check the mission overview.
a2b01ea4708f28cdbc8e3ea6bf3961a889d09cca.text_normalized: Captain, I will remind you, just check the mission overview.

669fbefeff348650cdab8178502aa1d97b1ad4dd.speaker: Greg
669fbefeff348650cdab8178502aa1d97b1ad4dd.text_raw: Right, Once you're in the next system, head over to Point Station. They might be able to help you out. Good luck.
669fbefeff348650cdab8178502aa1d97b1ad4dd.text_normalized: Right, Once you're in the next system, head over to Point Station. They might be able to help you out. Good luck.

68c43b20358ceb08b5b73ca68288882e509f7be6.speaker: captain
68c43b20358ceb08b5b73ca68288882e509f7be6.text_raw: Hey there, I'm looking for an ECHO engineer.
68c43b20358ceb08b5b73ca68288882e509f7be6.text_normalized: Hey there, I'm looking for an ECHO engineer.

0c8fb9c7440f9cdfc210b2e733f0d54933a5cc1e.speaker: Virgil
0c8fb9c7440f9cdfc210b2e733f0d54933a5cc1e.text_raw: I see, ain't nobody of that caliber 'round here.
0c8fb9c7440f9cdfc210b2e733f0d54933a5cc1e.text_normalized: I see, ain't nobody of that caliber 'round here.

aa1806c81719d334ecc3a5d9393b81c8e5aad8aa.speaker: captain

aa1806c81719d334ecc3a5d9393b81c8e5aad8aa.text_normalized: Of course, ECHOs do seem pretty rare here.

1c871679c8d0ec15fd9c3e34e6bb52f3cfd80b5e.speaker: Virgil
1c871679c8d0ec15fd9c3e34e6bb52f3cfd80b5e.text_raw: Yeah... can't help you with that. I gotta go now. Bye.
1c871679c8d0ec15fd9c3e34e6bb52f3cfd80b5e.text_normalized: Yeah, can't help you with that. I gotta go now. Bye.

3ef248f7a4dcf07c2bf653856720b71ee264cfb9.speaker: ECHO
3ef248f7a4dcf07c2bf653856720b71ee264cfb9.text_raw: Captain, I have located another station we should visit, but it is in the next system.
3ef248f7a4dcf07c2bf653856720b71ee264cfb9.text_normalized: Captain, I have located another station we should visit, but it is in the next system.

74045d4860dcc8577ae8ee23d3b5cc8340c73992.speaker: ECHO
74045d4860dcc8577ae8ee23d3b5cc8340c73992.text_raw: We should run some missions from the Mission Board to purchase a pass to the next system.
74045d4860dcc8577ae8ee23d3b5cc8340c73992.text_normalized: We should run some missions from the Mission Board to purchase a pass to the next system.

7ac2562467e934d8087f21172d87716261d2ec22.speaker: ECHO
7ac2562467e934d8087f21172d87716261d2ec22.text_raw: We can use the material (local) and armory (global) storage to help manage our items. You can access it through the inventory overview.
7ac2562467e934d8087f21172d87716261d2ec22.text_normalized: We can use the material (local) and armory (global) storage to help manage our items. You can access it through the inventory overview.

32ee12db2847b78efaf2d1aaefaf0e594aa10469.speaker: captain
32ee12db2847b78efaf2d1aaefaf0e594aa10469.text_raw: In the sidepanel, I got it. Let's get to it.
32ee12db2847b78efaf2d1aaefaf0e594aa10469.text_normalized: In the sidepanel, I got it. Let's get to it.

e96ab518137c8c4a9a0c6c573723fad228dacd62.speaker: Creed
e96ab518137c8c4a9a0c6c573723fad228dacd62.text_raw: I was part of The Second Wave, serving as a senior mechanic aboard the colony ship Orbitan of the 19th Expeditionary Fleet.
e96ab518137c8c4a9a0c6c573723fad228dacd62.text_normalized: I was part of The Second Wave, serving as a senior mechanic aboard the colony ship Orbitan of the 19th Expeditionary Fleet.

7da8451ac1bff6bfbc3be1636f819e25c216f1cb.speaker: Creed
7da8451ac1bff6bfbc3be1636f819e25c216f1cb.text_raw: We were... I guess... just one of the unlucky ones, ending up here.
7da8451ac1bff6bfbc3be1636f819e25c216f1cb.text_normalized: We were, I guess, just one of the unlucky ones, ending up here.

08c8fa23cb9efa188185d90840c484210b4d9612.speaker: Creed
08c8fa23cb9efa188185d90840c484210b4d9612.text_raw: Time passed. More ships from other fleets started showing up..
08c8fa23cb9efa188185d90840c484210b4d9612.text_normalized: Time passed. More ships from other fleets started showing up.

4e8fcc48f85fdcac17c3a2eb2c677b2ca33bc3c2.speaker: Creed
4e8fcc48f85fdcac17c3a2eb2c677b2ca33bc3c2.text_raw: Contracted captains, freelancers, outlaws... haven't seen a lot of major factions here, funnily enough.
4e8fcc48f85fdcac17c3a2eb2c677b2ca33bc3c2.text_normalized: Contracted captains, freelancers, outlaws, haven't seen a lot of major factions here, funnily enough.

95a4e3b392c789f2783e5e9d30ef26e512379a59.speaker: Creed
95a4e3b392c789f2783e5e9d30ef26e512379a59.text_raw: Well, not all of them were friendly, but most were. If we wanted to survive, we had to work together.
95a4e3b392c789f2783e5e9d30ef26e512379a59.text_normalized: Well, not all of them were friendly, but most were. If we wanted to survive, we had to work together.

6c5e99f7e09ea154cb88ba044eee47cab4edb910.speaker: Creed
6c5e99f7e09ea154cb88ba044eee47cab4edb910.text_raw: And that's why I am helping you, so we can help eachother.
6c5e99f7e09ea154cb88ba044eee47cab4edb910.text_normalized: And that's why I am helping you, so we can help eachother.

28716f3d247d7e9f12cf4af85e83bfd7979a5278.speaker: captain
28716f3d247d7e9f12cf4af85e83bfd7979a5278.text_raw: Hello. It's a long shot, but do you happen to have an ECHO engineer around here?
28716f3d247d7e9f12cf4af85e83bfd7979a5278.text_normalized: Hello. It's a long shot, but do you happen to have an ECHO engineer around here?

2e4309981d60e2de105cf0f3a2e793e479de2e8c.speaker: ECHO

2e4309981d60e2de105cf0f3a2e793e479de2e8c.text_normalized: My AI Core was damaged during the journey through the Great Gate.

25efd0dd37922cf6b0bd6c50ad0a54e0ae771477.speaker: Creed

25efd0dd37922cf6b0bd6c50ad0a54e0ae771477.text_normalized: What?! They don't get damaged, they get destroyed!

a66f0fd61d5a857aade1d6e67d5b5592ecb9d87e.speaker: Elena

a66f0fd61d5a857aade1d6e67d5b5592ecb9d87e.text_normalized: Creed? What's going on. Oh my.

02ad05ccfdf6621c0c9e940224a9cb8c4ea99655.speaker: Elena

02ad05ccfdf6621c0c9e940224a9cb8c4ea99655.text_normalized: Let me see, hmm, yes, what, how, ?

04ae19b07482e9ca1b5ddffc5271e417f4573e3f.speaker: Elena
04ae19b07482e9ca1b5ddffc5271e417f4573e3f.text_raw: Sorry, this is just... very exciting.
04ae19b07482e9ca1b5ddffc5271e417f4573e3f.text_normalized: Sorry, this is just, very exciting.

2f88acf0b0fa07f547dd89a4947d5d3bde05a20a.speaker: captain

2f88acf0b0fa07f547dd89a4947d5d3bde05a20a.text_normalized: I guess, are you able to repair the core?

052e21f4c66902d2a96454ea304ea1c79ff530fb.speaker: Elena
052e21f4c66902d2a96454ea304ea1c79ff530fb.text_raw: Creed? Give them the nav coordinates.
052e21f4c66902d2a96454ea304ea1c79ff530fb.text_normalized: Creed? Give them the nav coordinates.

94dd957005b491cfaa559721f544b2b8dd5d5c31.speaker: Creed

94dd957005b491cfaa559721f544b2b8dd5d5c31.text_normalized: Yeah, we won't get this opportunity again.

89c7828fb14869aeb649e210015c6fca5ddaaca9.speaker: Creed

89c7828fb14869aeb649e210015c6fca5ddaaca9.text_normalized: We just have to put our faith in you, stranger. Here you go.

8fc19cc616d1c18a5de2b6e3c975c72a9466abfa.speaker: Creed
8fc19cc616d1c18a5de2b6e3c975c72a9466abfa.text_raw: There's an old derelict corvette out there with a Damaged AI Core. Salvage it and bring it back here. We should be able to use that one to craft a new one.
8fc19cc616d1c18a5de2b6e3c975c72a9466abfa.text_normalized: There's an old derelict corvette out there with a Damaged AI Core. Salvage it and bring it back here. We should be able to use that one to craft a new one.

45c0af16fcafc2ba494773b19871e1dffee82971.speaker: Elena
45c0af16fcafc2ba494773b19871e1dffee82971.text_raw: Wait! Captain, if you don't mind, I'd love to join your crew...
45c0af16fcafc2ba494773b19871e1dffee82971.text_normalized: Wait! Captain, if you don't mind, I'd love to join your crew.

84d131d3015027ebd5edb5eb75f9edc79cf6b8fe.speaker: captain
84d131d3015027ebd5edb5eb75f9edc79cf6b8fe.text_raw: Sure, I guess... We'll take all the help we can get.
84d131d3015027ebd5edb5eb75f9edc79cf6b8fe.text_normalized: Sure, I guess. We'll take all the help we can get.

75abd05f3c5190569dc175334b7a4504ae20c848.speaker: Elena
75abd05f3c5190569dc175334b7a4504ae20c848.text_raw: This is great! Finally, we might actually get out of here.
75abd05f3c5190569dc175334b7a4504ae20c848.text_normalized: This is great! Finally, we might actually get out of here.

ab055128acb47e938c8e9fea0a1f1fc320c3a4e1.speaker: Creed
ab055128acb47e938c8e9fea0a1f1fc320c3a4e1.text_raw: Good, you're back. How did it go?
ab055128acb47e938c8e9fea0a1f1fc320c3a4e1.text_normalized: Good, you're back. How did it go?

65aa0265f5ee301d7621c2acdfd2efb18f2d3d46.speaker: Elena
65aa0265f5ee301d7621c2acdfd2efb18f2d3d46.text_raw: Creed, we managed to salvage the damaged AI Core!
65aa0265f5ee301d7621c2acdfd2efb18f2d3d46.text_normalized: Creed, we managed to salvage the damaged AI Core!

e4c36d642fa418ec9c933e5d71ddabcfb271cc80.speaker: Creed
e4c36d642fa418ec9c933e5d71ddabcfb271cc80.text_raw: That's excellent news! We still have the knowledge to craft AI Cores, just no working ECHOs to place them in... until now
e4c36d642fa418ec9c933e5d71ddabcfb271cc80.text_normalized: That's excellent news! We still have the knowledge to craft AI Cores, just no working ECHOs to place them in, until now

d5eba78145beb8480f133228ef473f1a07e5e033.speaker: Creed

d5eba78145beb8480f133228ef473f1a07e5e033.text_normalized: I've added the Industrial skill tree to your learning implant, it looks like you didn't have one before.

21124a791e47de028c785a02f0fee339d3d6183f.speaker: captain
21124a791e47de028c785a02f0fee339d3d6183f.text_raw: I won't say no to that.
21124a791e47de028c785a02f0fee339d3d6183f.text_normalized: I won't say no to that.

9bcddf00f0bab6cde8db458c0ccef48223d3e96c.text_normalized: It's not necessary right now, but there are some useful upgrades in it if you have the skill points to spare.

42f431fb24d3c4703c120dfa749bc4d69ff726d8.text_raw: Head over to the forge, craft the AI Core, and come back to me as soon as you can.
42f431fb24d3c4703c120dfa749bc4d69ff726d8.text_normalized: Head over to the forge, craft the AI Core, and come back to me as soon as you can.

021d5fb65fb32a32f3ef3e7c82432c34f8856110.speaker: captain
021d5fb65fb32a32f3ef3e7c82432c34f8856110.text_raw: Got it. I'll head over there now.
021d5fb65fb32a32f3ef3e7c82432c34f8856110.text_normalized: Got it. I'll head over there now.

70e95657623886f29c22f84d206add098ca280fb.speaker: Elena

70e95657623886f29c22f84d206add098ca280fb.text_normalized: Yes, this is a perfect fit.

706afe0df21e55579686f3d40e2a772106554741.speaker: ECHO

706afe0df21e55579686f3d40e2a772106554741.text_normalized: Just kidding. Systems are stable. I've reallocated 4% of my processing power to humor.

25e3b56e54cbda0016a5f6da1c67453ba50db424.speaker: Creed

25e3b56e54cbda0016a5f6da1c67453ba50db424.text_normalized: You gave me quite a scare there. Well, good job,

e290f75f76db554276a736fc3cc6d6d1ab126ad3.speaker: Creed
e290f75f76db554276a736fc3cc6d6d1ab126ad3.text_raw: Your ECHO is the only one who can communicate with the constructor unit in the Hermetis system.
e290f75f76db554276a736fc3cc6d6d1ab126ad3.text_normalized: Your ECHO is the only one who can communicate with the constructor unit in the Hermetis system.

13e03757386bbf69a754afafac03dbf189f54aea.speaker: Creed
13e03757386bbf69a754afafac03dbf189f54aea.text_raw: It's the gate that connects this sector to the rest of the galaxy.
13e03757386bbf69a754afafac03dbf189f54aea.text_normalized: It's the gate that connects this sector to the rest of the galaxy.

dcee00f39da21e7563d72f630548e30e348b3c03.speaker: Elena
dcee00f39da21e7563d72f630548e30e348b3c03.text_raw: So, once we repair the gate, we can finally leave this place!
dcee00f39da21e7563d72f630548e30e348b3c03.text_normalized: So, once we repair the gate, we can finally leave this place!

617804bd2f0651609f89e62e56d5a8211ff8e335.speaker: Creed
617804bd2f0651609f89e62e56d5a8211ff8e335.text_raw: It's most likely being guarded by at least one pirate. They are trying to block us from entering that system. They are not in a rush to let us leave this sector...
617804bd2f0651609f89e62e56d5a8211ff8e335.text_normalized: It's most likely being guarded by at least one pirate. They are trying to block us from entering that system. They are not in a rush to let us leave this sector.

1213ddd95887aa21377833f3e70d4808c327c68b.speaker: Creed
1213ddd95887aa21377833f3e70d4808c327c68b.text_raw: Once you take care of them, head back over here.
1213ddd95887aa21377833f3e70d4808c327c68b.text_normalized: Once you take care of them, head back over here.

94c091addd148d1ceeaa5abc3839746d3c265279.speaker: ECHO
94c091addd148d1ceeaa5abc3839746d3c265279.text_raw: Captain, I can now take over certain tasks. You can toggle me on or off in your sidepanel.
94c091addd148d1ceeaa5abc3839746d3c265279.text_normalized: Captain, I can now take over certain tasks. You can toggle me on or off in your sidepanel.

18978bbc35506b88f724f0dead4f34b3fe200a02.speaker: ECHO
18978bbc35506b88f724f0dead4f34b3fe200a02.text_raw: It would also be helpful if you learn
18978bbc35506b88f724f0dead4f34b3fe200a02.text_normalized: It would also be helpful if you learn

da3f28034895e0a1bd95ba7ecc5da46ad91359d2.speaker: ECHO
da3f28034895e0a1bd95ba7ecc5da46ad91359d2.text_raw: Go grab something to drink, read a book, whatever you want really. I can handle the more basic tasks, just not at maximum efficiency... yet.
da3f28034895e0a1bd95ba7ecc5da46ad91359d2.text_normalized: Go grab something to drink, read a book, whatever you want really. I can handle the more basic tasks, just not at maximum efficiency, yet.

48b5f9582b6a092e261502ac8fd0fe69f513e325.speaker: Creed
48b5f9582b6a092e261502ac8fd0fe69f513e325.text_raw: Not much stands in our way now, just the gate repairs.
48b5f9582b6a092e261502ac8fd0fe69f513e325.text_normalized: Not much stands in our way now, just the gate repairs.

52ff530c5a0a9a1a6ac3cdd78dac8aef73de2e66.speaker: Elena
52ff530c5a0a9a1a6ac3cdd78dac8aef73de2e66.text_raw: Well, we still need the materials,
52ff530c5a0a9a1a6ac3cdd78dac8aef73de2e66.text_normalized: Well, we still need the materials,

5d31eb0f9369913716c381a3fde6fa5e7cccc93d.speaker: Creed
5d31eb0f9369913716c381a3fde6fa5e7cccc93d.text_raw: You could mine or salvage the materials, but seeing as you are quite capable in combat...
5d31eb0f9369913716c381a3fde6fa5e7cccc93d.text_normalized: You could mine or salvage the materials, but seeing as you are quite capable in combat.

76c5ee98b4de6372415033146089016fa6f92830.speaker: Creed
76c5ee98b4de6372415033146089016fa6f92830.text_raw: The pirates stole the materials we needed for the repairs
76c5ee98b4de6372415033146089016fa6f92830.text_normalized: The pirates stole the materials we needed for the repairs

3b2e26837d4dd6ffadee00ac845dfeb0830a85e9.speaker: Creed
3b2e26837d4dd6ffadee00ac845dfeb0830a85e9.text_raw: They are quite formidable, so having a ship with a shield generator would help quite a bit.
3b2e26837d4dd6ffadee00ac845dfeb0830a85e9.text_normalized: They are quite formidable, so having a ship with a shield generator would help quite a bit.

a0def03d81e245d605dbd0f39a26cb7c91f7f583.speaker: Creed
a0def03d81e245d605dbd0f39a26cb7c91f7f583.text_raw: I'll give you the location of these pirate groups. Defeat them and we'll collect the materials they've stolen from us.
a0def03d81e245d605dbd0f39a26cb7c91f7f583.text_normalized: I'll give you the location of these pirate groups. Defeat them and we'll collect the materials they've stolen from us.

f3da5dbd348149cd0fc9d22f4afa5535a0f3c7f6.speaker: Creed
f3da5dbd348149cd0fc9d22f4afa5535a0f3c7f6.text_raw: We attuned your ship with the gate leading to Octantis, that's where the pirates are holding up. It should be unlocked now.
f3da5dbd348149cd0fc9d22f4afa5535a0f3c7f6.text_normalized: We attuned your ship with the gate leading to Octantis, that's where the pirates are holding up. It should be unlocked now.

b8495595ba55a3c1ad50628798687f374634b327.speaker: Creed
b8495595ba55a3c1ad50628798687f374634b327.text_raw: Captain, it'd be a huge help if you could track down and craft what we need.
b8495595ba55a3c1ad50628798687f374634b327.text_normalized: Captain, it'd be a huge help if you could track down and craft what we need.

43dedd67d7da4ae86952aa3ebef1fea2790c3e1b.speaker: Creed
43dedd67d7da4ae86952aa3ebef1fea2790c3e1b.text_raw: Some of the raw stuff's more common in the lower systems.Take this gate pass from Octantis to Sparax.
43dedd67d7da4ae86952aa3ebef1fea2790c3e1b.text_normalized: Some of the raw stuff's more common in the lower systems.Take this gate pass from Octantis to Sparax.

4a8d699ecc440d46ce2ab0329d203cf4d314c6a5.speaker: captain
4a8d699ecc440d46ce2ab0329d203cf4d314c6a5.text_raw: Understood. Let's put ECHO to work.
4a8d699ecc440d46ce2ab0329d203cf4d314c6a5.text_normalized: Understood. Let's put ECHO to work.

701da88e5aa60a17a84ef18da31cbadc321e8986.speaker: Creed
701da88e5aa60a17a84ef18da31cbadc321e8986.text_raw: Well, you dealt quite a blow to their presence, so you have my utmost thanks.
701da88e5aa60a17a84ef18da31cbadc321e8986.text_normalized: Well, you dealt quite a blow to their presence, so you have my utmost thanks.

12865614655a08423b52b685fb53c9c89037652c.speaker: Creed
12865614655a08423b52b685fb53c9c89037652c.text_raw: We already send someone to bring most of the materials to the gate.
12865614655a08423b52b685fb53c9c89037652c.text_normalized: We already send someone to bring most of the materials to the gate.

8cd21d8f623e1df6fa671e646607665946c85899.speaker: Creed

8cd21d8f623e1df6fa671e646607665946c85899.text_normalized: I will transfer the Signal Array to your cargo, only your ECHO can link this to the gate.

b250454f0d6161c6163fb4efbb9a350f40b09b9c.speaker: Creed
b250454f0d6161c6163fb4efbb9a350f40b09b9c.text_raw: Should be the last thing to do, and we can all get out of this sector.
b250454f0d6161c6163fb4efbb9a350f40b09b9c.text_normalized: Should be the last thing to do, and we can all get out of this sector.

03a41941e0ee444d3032618a47988660f9fe9b4c.speaker: Creed
03a41941e0ee444d3032618a47988660f9fe9b4c.text_raw: Give me the good news, Captain.
03a41941e0ee444d3032618a47988660f9fe9b4c.text_normalized: Give me the good news, Captain.

81e1acf55d2498f7710ced0b450985f13e19e073.speaker: Creed
81e1acf55d2498f7710ced0b450985f13e19e073.text_raw: You don't know how much you've helped us, thank you so much.
81e1acf55d2498f7710ced0b450985f13e19e073.text_normalized: You don't know how much you've helped us, thank you so much.

fd1004a8183c4b76a5cd5fff3f4f3446f58f9b8c.speaker: Elena

fd1004a8183c4b76a5cd5fff3f4f3446f58f9b8c.text_normalized: I'd like to stay with the Captain permanently, if that's okay with you,

0e0dcab8f4f567221a61162fca189c6029c5969b.speaker: Creed
0e0dcab8f4f567221a61162fca189c6029c5969b.text_raw: Of course. You make a good team. Goodbye,
0e0dcab8f4f567221a61162fca189c6029c5969b.text_normalized: Of course. You make a good team. Goodbye,

4d59913f0e72ee9a104e7c894c012929b721cfca.speaker: Creed

4d59913f0e72ee9a104e7c894c012929b721cfca.text_normalized: You might even make it all the way into Darkspace with your ECHO, if it's real. Anyway, good luck.
